items.title: As social habits evolve, we sought to learn how people are making friends
items.summary_auto: "How do I meet new people?" That question — especially for adults — is all over the internet. CBC News spoke to Calgarians about how they're making friends, and an expert on the cost of loneliness and social isolation.

items.title: Iran responds to ceasefire proposal as Kuwait, U.A.E. repel drone attacks
items.summary_auto: Iran has sent its response to the latest U.S. ceasefire proposal to Pakistani mediators and wants negotiations to focus on permanently ending the war, Iran's state-run media said Sunday.

items.title: How a $500M Cape Breton drug bust helped inspire the film Little Lorraine
items.summary_auto: In late July 1990, in the waters off Nova Scotia and at a tiny Cape Breton wharf, a plot to unload around two-dozen tonnes of hash was foiled by RCMP, the coast guard and the military. A judge later called the plan "one of the largest conspiracies ever to import drugs through the Nova Scotia coast."

items.title: I had an unplanned baby at 17. I never expected to battle infertility in my 30s
items.summary_auto: Lisa Richardson had an unplanned pregnancy in her teens and gave up that child for adoption. She always assumed that getting pregnant and becoming a mom would be easy when she was ready. But life took an unexpected turn.

items.title: Forced offline for most of 2026, Iranians say they're struggling to survive
items.summary_auto: Iranians have faced a near-total blackout for more than 70 days straight. The shutdown has cost the Iranian economy an estimated $250-million US a day.

items.title: 'It haunts my dreams': Heather Winterstein’s mother reflects on marathon inquest into Ontario ER death
items.summary_auto: Francine Shimizu-Orgar has frequent nightmares when her mind replays moments from the recent inquest into her daughter's death at the St. Catharines, Ont., hospital. But if the inquiry, which the family pushed for, wasn't held, what happened to 24-year-old Heather Winterstein "would never have come out," Shimizu-Orgar tells CBC from the family home in the Niagara region city.

items.title: Winnie the Pooh has been beloved for 100 years. But fame wasn't so enchanting for the real Christopher Robin
items.summary_auto: One hundred years after Winnie the Pooh was published, it continues to enchant. Its origins have a happy beginning in the bond between a Canadian veterinary soldier and the cub he named for his adopted hometown, but the story takes an unhappy turn as the Milnes struggled with the effects of fame.

items.title: Ontario police investigating Senior Assassin game after unhoused man sprayed with water gun
items.summary_auto: Police in parts of Canada are warning high school students about the risks of playing a game that may have the public mistaking their water guns for real weapons. In one Ontario community, police are investigating students who appear to have targeted an unhoused Indigenous man.

items.title: At the Venice Biennale, Canada’s entry blooms with unease
items.summary_auto: In a Venice Biennale taking place at a time of wars, tension over migration and climate anxiety, the Canadian pavilion poses a quieter question: Who gets to live with nature, who gets to protect it and who is shut out from it?

items.title: 5 years after promising to restrict vaping flavours, it's unclear whether Canada will
items.summary_auto: The federal Liberals have said since 2021 they'll restrict vaping flavours nationwide, but now Canada’s health minister won’t say when or even if it will still happen — despite widespread expert advice a ban could help curb the country's staggering youth vaping rate.

items.title: Canadians on a plane home after being stuck on cruise ship hit by hantavirus outbreak
Motorcyclist seriously injured after crash leaves bike dangling from B.C. traffic light
items.summary_auto: Police say a motorcyclist was taken to hospital with serious injuries after a crash near the Surrey-Delta border Saturday afternoon left a motorcycle dangling from a traffic light above a busy intersection.
